case_title: SERGE HIDCHENKO VS. DENIS J. NORRINGTON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY HIDCHENKO, SERGE AS TO DEFENDANT NORRINGTON, DENIS J. DBA ARROW STAMP & COIN COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $50 SERVED DEC-02-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NORRINGTON, DENIS J. DBA ARROW STAMP & COIN COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-21-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HIDCHENKO, SERGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORRINGTON, DENIS J. DBA ARROW STAMP & COIN COMPANY $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
